prompt.task: 1. Delete README.md, SPEC.md and all docs/*.md files 2. Analyze the project, including: - what the architecture is - how input data is processed - how the system works - what algorithms are used - what the domain model is - what output data is produced - how to use the system. 3. Write documents for the project
prompt.output: 2. Write documents for the project in files: - docs/content-dump.md - docs/change-request.md - docs/legacy-warnings.md - docs/project-overview.md - docs/architecture.md - docs/domain-model.md - docs/algorithms.md - docs/api.md - docs/usage-guide.md 3. Write new README.md with summary of the project and links to the above documents.
